pom.xml.general_idea: Update the project version to 2.0.0-SNAPSHOT to reflect the major version bump associated with the JDK migration.
Update the Java source and target version property to 21 to align with the target JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x and many modern libraries require Java 17+ or 21+; keeping Java 17 might not break compilation immediately but is inconsistent with the target environment and Spring Boot 3 requirements.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Jackson version to 2.15.2 to ensure compatibility with Spring Boot 3.x.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Jackson 2.14+; older versions may cause runtime classpath conflicts or missing API errors.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade SLF4J to 2.0.7 to match the logging API changes in Spring Boot 3.x.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x uses SLF4J 2.0; using SLF4J 1.7 causes runtime linkage errors or missing method exceptions.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade AspectJ tools to 1.9.20 for compatibility with newer Java versions and Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older AspectJ versions may fail to compile or weave code correctly on Java 21 or with Spring Boot 3's AOP implementation.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade JUnit Jupiter to 5.10.0 to ensure test compatibility with Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older JUnit versions may not support Java 21 module system or Spring Boot 3 test context properly.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot to 3.1.5, which is the primary driver for the JDK 21 migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 fully and uses javax.* packages; Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17+ and uses jakarta.* packages. Without this, the app cannot run on JDK 21 with modern Spring features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove Spring Boot OAuth dependency as it is deprecated/removed in Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: The artifact does not exist in Spring Boot 3 ecosystem; keeping it causes build failure.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove Spring Boot Social dependency as it is deprecated/removed in Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: The artifact does not exist in Spring Boot 3 ecosystem; keeping it causes build failure.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Apache Commons Lang to 3.13.0 for compatibility and bug fixes.
Upgrade Apache Commons Text to 1.10.0 for compatibility.
Upgrade Apache Commons IO to 2.13.0 for compatibility.
Upgrade Swagger version to 1.6.9.
Upgrade PostgreSQL driver to 42.6.0 for Java 21 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older drivers may have issues with Java 21 module system or security features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Hibernate to 6.2.7.Final to align with Jakarta Persistence and Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: Hibernate 5.x uses javax.persistence; Hibernate 6.x uses jakarta.persistence. Mixing them causes compile/runtime errors.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Tomcat version property 10.1.14 to align with Spring Boot 3's embedded Tomcat.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 uses Tomcat 10.x (Jakarta EE 9+); specifying the version ensures consistency.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Maven JAR plugin to 3.3.0.
Upgrade Maven ASM plugin to 9.4.
Upgrade Maven Assembly plugin to 3.4.2.
Update SCM tag to HEAD to reflect the current development state.
Replace maven-compiler-plugin 'release' configuration with explicit 'source' and 'target' properties.
pom.xml.why_exists: While 'release' is preferred, some environments or plugin versions may have issues; this change ensures explicit compatibility settings.
